data.title: Digital Governance Initiatives Expanded Across States
data.desc: Several states have adopted integrated digital service delivery platforms to improve citizen access and transparency.

data.title: Parliament Reviews Public Service Delivery Mechanisms
data.desc: A parliamentary committee examined the effectiveness of service delivery reforms in key welfare schemes.

data.title: District Administration Adopts AI-based Monitoring
data.desc: AI-powered dashboards are being used to track implementation of developmental programs.

data.title: Social Audit Framework Strengthened
data.desc: New guidelines aim to improve transparency and accountability in rural development projects.

data.title: Citizen Feedback Portals Gain Popularity
data.desc: Governments are increasingly relying on citizen feedback systems to improve service quality.
